posts.author: wesolowp (Paweł Wesołowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Team,

I hope you’re well.

Are there plans to include detailed dependency information in the API? Specifically, I’m looking for:

  1. Dependency Type: Information on whether a dependency is Finish to Start, Start to Start, etc.
  2. Lag of Dependencies: The ability to access lag details of dependencies when they are set to “Strict” mode.

These features would greatly improve our project management. Are there any plans to include these details in the API roadmap?

Thanks for your hard work!

Best regards,
Paweł
